headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Principal Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $107
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Principal Financial Group (NASDAQ:PFG) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $95 to $107.
